name: Neve LO2567 (Ungapped Output, Neve Hot)
usage: Variante ungapped du LI1166 — preset Neve Hot
notes: Ungapped variant of LI1166. Same impedances but no air gap. Saturates earlier, more harmonic coloration. No DC tolerance. Sans entrefer, le noyau NiFe 50% sature plus tot — plus de couleur harmonique, caractere 'Neve Hot'.
